# GitHub Configuration

GitHub-specific configuration including CI/CD workflows, issue templates, and community files.

## Structure

```
.github/
├── workflows/     — GitHub Actions CI/CD pipelines
├── ISSUE_TEMPLATE/ — Issue and bug report templates
└── PULL_REQUEST_TEMPLATE.md — PR template
```

## Workflows

CI/CD pipelines for:
- Linting and code quality checks
- Automated testing (unit, integration)
- Security scanning
- Docker image building
- Deployment to staging/production

## Templates

Standardized templates ensure consistent:
- Bug reports with reproduction steps
- Feature requests with use cases
- Pull requests with change descriptions
